3c:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"ViewportBoundary"]

7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"For AI Agents"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you are an LLM agent installing Mnemosyne for a user, copy the block that matches the deployment target. Each block is self-contained and ends with a verify step."}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Standard Python SDK (any agent, includes semantic search):"}]}]
a:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]\n"}]}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hermes Agent plugin (most common — bundles core + embeddings automatically):"}]}]
c:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install mnemosyne-hermes\n"}]}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"All features (embeddings + local LLM + MCP):"}]}]
e:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n"}]}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Verify after install:"}]}]
10:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n"}]}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"For the detailed walkthrough (pipx, virtualenvs, MCP server setup, smoke test), see the sections below."}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Prerequisites"}]
13:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Python 3.10 or higher"}]," — ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python3 --version"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"pipx"}]," — ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install pipx && pipx ensurepath"}]]}],"\n"]}]
14:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Install"}]
15:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pipx install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n"}]}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":["That's it. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}]," gives you semantic vector search + local LLM consolidation. No database setup, no config files — Mnemosyne creates its SQLite database automatically on first use."]}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":"For speed:"}]
18:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"export PIPX_DEFAULT_BACKEND=uv\npipx install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n"}]}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Why pipx?"}]," Isolated virtualenv that survives system rebuilds, clean uninstall, no conflicts with other Python projects."]}]
1a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verify"}]
1b:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python3 -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n# Should print: 3.7.0\n"}]}]
1c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Upgrade"}]
1d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pipx upgrade mnemosyne-memory\n"}]}]
1e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Extras"}]
1f:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Extra"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it adds"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"RAM"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Bare install"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 keyword search only. Good for Raspberry Pi or remote embedding API."}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~50 MB"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"fastembed + sqlite-vec for semantic vector search"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~800 MB more"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"[llm]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"ctransformers for local LLM sleep consolidation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~600 MB more"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Everything: embeddings + LLM consolidation. Recommended for 8 GB+ systems."}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~1.5 GB total"}]]}]]}]]}]
20:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"To use pipx with extras"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pipx install 'mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]'"}]," (quotes required around brackets)."]}]
21:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hermes Agent users"}],": install ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pipx install mnemosyne-hermes"}]," instead — this bundles ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," automatically. See full instructions on the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"/api/hermes-plugin","children":"Hermes Plugin page"}],"."]}]
22:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verify Installation"}]
23:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python3 -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n"}]}]
24:["$","p",null,{"children":"Smoke test:"}]
25:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\nmem.remember(\"Installation test\", importance=0.1)\nresults = mem.recall(\"test\")\nprint(f\"Stored and retrieved {len(results)} memory\")\n"}]}]
26:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"MCP Server Setup"}]
27:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne includes a built-in MCP server for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients:"}]
28:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Add to Claude Desktop config (claude_desktop_config.json):\n{\n  \"mcpServers\": {\n    \"mnemosyne\": {\n      \"command\": \"mnemosyne\",\n      \"args\": [\"mcp\"]\n    }\n  }\n}\n"}]}]
29:["$","p",null,{"children":"For SSE transport (web clients):"}]
2a:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"mnemosyne mcp --transport sse --port 8080\n"}]}]
2b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Hermes Agent Integration"}]
2c:["$","p",null,{"children":["If you're using Mnemosyne as a Hermes plugin, see the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"/api/hermes-plugin","children":"Hermes Plugin"}]," page for the complete setup guide including config and troubleshooting."]}]
2d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Quick commands:"}]
2e:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pipx install mnemosyne-hermes\nhermes config set memory.provider mnemosyne\nhermes gateway restart\n"}]}]
2f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Development Install (from Source)"}]
30:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"git clone https://github.com/axdsan/mnemosyne.git\ncd mnemosyne\npython3 -m venv .venv\nsource .venv/bin/activate\npip install -e \".[dev]\"\n"}]}]
31:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"-e"}]," flag installs in \"editable\" mode — source changes take effect immediately."]}]
